The '''Geonosian transport''' was a model of [[Landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] donated by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] to the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
Mostly used for surface-to-surface transport, the craft was also capable of space flight. Its hyperdrive was limited to short jumps, which was just enough to escape pursuing fleets during planetary evacuations.

{{Ship-stub}}
